testcase.name: addProducts

failure.message: class org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver cannot be cast to class com.microsoft.playwright.Browser (org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver and com.microsoft.playwright.Browser are in unnamed module of loader 'app')
